title: JSX list components should not use array indexes as key
description: JSX list components should not use array indexes as keyAnalyze your codeintentionality-logicalmaintainabilityCode SmellreactjsxperformanceWhy is this an issue?More InfoTo optimize the rendering of React list components, a unique identifier (UID) is required for each list item. This UID lets React identify the item throughout its lifetime. Avoid array indexes since the order of the items may change, which will cause keys to not match up between renders, recreating the DOM.
recommendation: Refactor to eliminate the flagged pattern.

checks.message: Avoid using array index as JSX key - use unique, stable identifiers instead
Avoid using array index in JSX key expressions - can cause React reconciliation issues
